mapper.select: SELECT id AS scoreId, student_id AS studentId, course_id AS courseId, score FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT id AS scoreId, student_id AS studentId, course_id AS courseId, score FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT id AS scoreId, student_id AS studentId, course_id AS courseId, score FROM student_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_course (student_id, course_id, score) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{score})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM student_course WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
